banner_header: Ditch the banks !!! 💵 Compare the best exchange rates in Europe ...
notice_currency: Currencies not correct, please check again!
how_we_rank_text: Results are sorted by "You Get" — the actual amount the recipient receives. The top result gives you the most money, even if fees or exchange rates seem different. The Effective Rate shows the true cost per unit after all fees.
affiliate_disclosure: 📌 Affiliate Disclosure: We may earn a commission if you use our links to make a transfer. This helps us keep the service free. Our comparisons remain unbiased and we always show the best rates available.
revolut_title: 💡 Revolut has a special rate structure
revolut_estimate: The displayed rate is an ESTIMATE based on:
revolut_bullet1: ✓ Weekday rate within free tier limits
revolut_vary1: 📅 Day of week: 1% markup applies on weekends (Sat-Sun)
revolut_vary4: ⏰ Time of day: Rates update in real-time with market conditions
revolut_note: For the exact rate, please visit Revolut's website directly.
error_fetching: Error fetching rates. Please try again later.
no_results: 😕 No results found for this currency pair. Please try different currencies.
invalid_amount: Please enter a valid positive number!
same_currency: Source and target currencies cannot be the same!
